category_sources: Official Certbot GitHub description says it obtains certs from Let's Encrypt and can act as an ACME client: https://github.com/certbot/certbot
source_facts.description says Certbot obtains certificates from Let's Encrypt and auto-enables HTTPS.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title is Certbot documentation: https://certbot.eff.org/docs/
docs_sources: Official Certbot site links to and redirects to the maintained Certbot documentation: https://certbot.eff.org/docs/
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository is certbot/certbot and identifies itself as Certbot's software project: https://github.com/certbot/certbot
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes Certbot as an ACME client for certificate management: https://github.com/certbot/certbot
source_facts.description says it obtains certs from Let's Encrypt and auto-enables HTTPS.
